meta.name: Nepal
meta.title: Nepal Tour Package from Malaysia | Dhesu Travel & Tours
meta.description: Trek the Himalayas, explore Kathmandu and discover Pokhara. Nepal tour packages from Malaysia with Dhesu. Fully guided, affordable. Since 1988.

hero.badge: Eight of the World's Ten Highest Peaks
hero.headline: It Makes You Feel Small
hero.body: Stand in the Kathmandu Valley on a clear morning and look north. It is not a mountain range. It is a white wall at the top of the world, so large and so close your brain argues about whether it is real.

why.heading: Where the Spiritual, Physical and Natural All Meet
why.subheading: Nepal draws adventurers, obviously. But it also draws people who simply want to be somewhere that feels genuinely different from everywhere else they have been.

highlights.title: Kathmandu at the World's Crossroads
highlights.body: Joyfully chaotic streets that open suddenly into courtyards with ancient temples. Medieval Durbar Square, the sacred cremation ghats of Pashupatinath, the watching eyes of Boudhanath Stupa, and the 365 steps up to Swayambhunath, the Monkey Temple.

highlights.title: Pokhara and the Sarangkot Sunrise
highlights.body: On a clear day Phewa Lake holds the Annapurna range upside down in still water. Drive up Sarangkot in the dark, and watch the peaks catch first light and burn gold while the valley sleeps. One of the best ten minutes in travel.

highlights.title: Trekking for Every Level
highlights.body: You do not need to be a mountaineer. A three-day walk into the Annapurna foothills means teahouses, dal bhat and views from magazines. For the experienced, Annapurna Base Camp takes 7 to 12 days and Everest Base Camp 12 to 14.

highlights.title: Chitwan: Rhinos in the Jungle
highlights.body: In the southern lowlands the mountains vanish into subtropical jungle and elephant grass. Chitwan protects the greater one-horned rhino and is home to Bengal tigers, gharials and 500+ bird species. Most visitors never know it is there.

zones.heading: Where to Go and Why
zones.subheading: Most Nepal trips link the Kathmandu Valley, the Pokhara lakes and a Himalayan viewpoint, with Chitwan as a wild lowland add-on.

areas.name: Kathmandu
areas.description: The historic capital, packed with UNESCO temples, stupas and ancient squares. Joyfully chaotic, and every Nepal trip starts here.

areas.name: Pokhara
areas.description: Serene lakeside town beneath the Annapurna range. Phewa Lake boating, Sarangkot sunrises and the gateway to the great treks.

areas.name: Nagarkot
areas.description: A hill station at 2,200 metres with a 200-kilometre arc of the Himalaya, Everest included, from the viewing tower. Stay overnight for the sunrise.

areas.name: Chitwan
areas.description: Subtropical lowland national park. Jeep safaris, Rapti River canoe trips and Tharu villages, a complete change of pace from the peaks.

bestTime.heading: Best Time to Visit Nepal from Malaysia
bestTime.body: Clear mountain views depend heavily on season, so timing matters more in Nepal than almost anywhere. Kathmandu and Chitwan can be visited year-round.

seasons.name: Autumn
seasons.description: The clearest air of the year after the monsoon, with crisp skies and the best Himalayan views. Prime trekking and sightseeing season.

seasons.name: Spring
seasons.description: Clear skies and hillsides covered in rhododendron blooms. The second prime window for trekking and mountain views.

seasons.name: Monsoon Season
seasons.description: Mountains are often clouded and trekking is difficult, but Kathmandu's culture and the Chitwan jungle can still be enjoyed.

tripLength.heading: How Many Days Do You Actually Need?

options.label: Kathmandu Valley
options.description: Enough for Durbar Square, Pashupatinath, Boudhanath and Swayambhunath, plus a Nagarkot sunrise.

options.label: Sweet Spot
options.description: The classic Kathmandu and Pokhara combination, or the full circuit adding Nagarkot and Chitwan.

options.label: Everest Base Camp
options.description: A fully guided high-altitude trek with a proper acclimatisation schedule, within reach of reasonably fit travellers.

packages.heading: Nepal Packages for Every Traveller
packages.subheading: We design trekking packages across the full range, from easy foothills day walks to full expedition-style high-altitude treks. Visa documentation assistance and airport transfers included.
packages.ctaNote: Private and group packages available on request.

whyBook.heading: Why Book Your Nepal Trip Through Dhesu
whyBook.body: Nepal is not a destination where you want to leave things to chance. The mountain weather changes, flights to Pokhara and Lukla are sometimes delayed, and the trekking logistics need people who know what they are doing. The right preparation turns a good trip into an extraordinary one. We provide the preparation.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.description: Fully licensed and registered. We assist with visa documentation as part of every Nepal package.

points.title: Trusted Since 1988
points.description: 35+ years arranging Himalayan journeys and bringing travellers home with the trip of a lifetime.

points.title: Guides Who Know the Mountains
points.description: Not just the trail. Plus permits, teahouse bookings and the right pace and acclimatisation for the altitude.

points.title: The Right Rooms & Season
points.description: Kathmandu hotels with genuine rooftop Boudhanath views, and the right window for clear peaks.

cta.heading: Plan Your Nepal Trip
cta.subheading: The mountains are waiting. Tell us when you want to go.
